title: glechoma kotschyi
intro: Glechoma kotschyi, also known as Turkish creeping thyme or creeping galega, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Glechoma kotschyi include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Glechoma kotschyi can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
